_comment: Per-step fixture data consumed by Video Mode auto-fill cues. Keys are referenced by `fill-from-fixture` / `select-from-fixture` cues in the flow's step.cues. Edit values to change the demo persona without touching code.

a2-cswp-assets.cbomScope: All production systems handling customer financial data

a3-cswp-risk.riskTitle: Harvest-Now Decrypt-Later exposure on settlement and transaction logs

a4-cswp-migration.pilotScope: Internal TLS between core banking and message broker
a4-cswp-migration.pilotSuccessCriteria: Hybrid handshake stable under production load for 14 consecutive days
